title: Welcome to the Boiler
intro: This starter project is organised to help you ship front-end and back-end features quickly.
instructions: Add new reusable UI to atoms, molecules, or organisms depending on complexity.
Compose page wrappers in layouts to define headers, navigation, and page chrome.
Create a page folder in pages/ with its own component, styles, and translations.
Extend or create skins to customise typography, colours, and theming.
Connect to the API server running on port 2000 for backend integrations.
cta: Read the README to learn how to templatise this repository.
